snippet.title: Le Male → Baccarat Rouge 540. Same nose, Francis Kurkdjian! 🤯👑 Which would you choose? 🔥👇#perfume
snippet.description:
2/30 days 🙂 30 perfume challange 🍋 2/30 days 🙂 30 perfume challange 🍋 Did you know that the same nose behind the 90s legend Le Male is the creator of the iconic Baccarat Rouge 540? 🤯✨
Francis Kurkdjian really went from defining an era to creating the scent of the decade. A true master at work! 👑👃
Drop a "🔥" in the comments if you knew this, or let me know which one you’d choose! 👇
.
.
.
#ScentOfTheDay #NichePerfume #PerfumeCollection#PerfumeCommunity #franciskurkdjian
.
